expertise levels.name: Novice
expertise levels.description: No knowledge whatsoever of the topic. Operate by using context-free features and rules.

expertise levels.name: Advanced Beginner
expertise levels.description: Understand the basics of the topic. Understand the basics of the context. Use more sophisticated rules that are situational.

expertise levels.name: Competent
expertise levels.description: Clear understanding of the topic and its context. Posses a hierarchical procedure for making decisions. Is able to solve problems, but slow reasoning.

expertise levels.name: Expert
expertise levels.description: Clear understanding of the topic and its context. Posses a hierarchical procedure for making decisions. Is able to quickly solve problems. It can detect new problems and create new ideas by connecting past knowledge and experience

profiles.name: Operator
purpose of using model: Understand most influential manufacturing process conditions to prevent defects at the operations level.
Understand most influential manufacturing process conditions that lead to defects for proactively planning machine maintenance

profiles.name: Manager
purpose of using model: Get information for preparing reports and taking decisions. Information such as: defect rate, process conditions that lead to defects, process conditions that lead to normal products.

profiles.name: Data Scientist
purpose of using model: Get technical information such as probility density functions of the predictive model
Get feature importance of the predictive model.
